_notes: Set the @-prefixed secrets via `vercel env add` or the dashboard.
PRIVATE_KEY is required for /api/agent/log to upload decisions to 0G Storage.
KEEPERHUB_API_KEY enables the live KeeperHub status panel in /notes#status.
NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL should be the deployed app origin so x402 resource offers point to the live endpoint.
NEXT_PUBLIC_PRIVY_APP_ID flips the wallet button from 'demo mode' to live.
